paper_title: Patch-Based Contrastive Learning and Memory Consolidation for Online Unsupervised Continual Learning
method_full_name: Patch-based Contrastive learning and Memory Consolidation
challenges_addressed: Non-stationary data stream (increasing number of classes)
Unlabeled data (real-time novel class identification without supervision)
Cannot store data for replay (online stream learning)
applications: AI-powered drone exploring new construction sites
Face recognition systems for unseen people
key_features: Minimal data retention due to storage/privacy constraints
No boundary between training and inference
title: Patch-Based Contrastive Learning and Memory Consolidation for Online Unsupervised Continual Learning
